title: Magnetic Moments of $J^P={3/2}^+$ Pentaquarks
author_string: W. -W. Li, Y. -R. Liu, P. -Z. Huang, W. -Z. Deng, X. -L. Chen et al.
abstract: If the $J^P$ of $Θ_5^+$ and $Ξ_5^{--}$ pentaquarks is really found to be ${1\over 2}^+$ by future experiments, they will be accompanied by $J^P={3\over 2}^+$ partners in some models. It is reasonable to expect that these $J^P={3\over 2}^+$ states will also be discovered in the near future with the current intensive experimental and theoretical efforts. We estimate $J^P={3/2}^+$ pentaquark magnetic moments using different models.
